/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/drogon_server.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/drogon_server.dir/src/controllers/invoice-controller/invoice-controller.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/drogon_server.dir/src/env/env.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drogon_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o drogon_server  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/libcares.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/libjsoncpp.so /lib/libuuid.so /usr/lib/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/libz.so
